MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff La Salle Preservation Limited Partnership is present. Represented by Sherene Jackson.
Attorney Jane L. Creason appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Sadriena Jones and Lamar Banks are present.
Attorney Betty Hsu-Nordstedt representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of May-7-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
